reasons: Auto sector vulnerable to inventory build-up at the dealer level and softening urban demand. Rising input costs (steel, aluminium) and potential fuel price hikes could squeeze margins over the near term.

Market backdrop: India VIX has spiked to 22.0, indicating elevated fear — headwind for risk assets.
